subject: GREEN LIGHT — DA moderator Phase 1, execution plan approved

body.summary: Feasibility assessment reviewed and approved. Proceed with DA moderator Phase 1 as outlined in your execution plan. Three notes below.
body.decision: APPROVED — execute DA Phase 1 (Models A, B, C comparison)

notes.guidance: Good catch on the non-positive-definite FIM risk propagating from Model A to Model B. Report CI on fit indices as planned — if FIM issues persist across models, that constitutes a structural finding about the bifactor specification itself, not just a computational artifact.

Agree that RMSEA=0.129 baseline leaves little room for improvement within noise. Consider reporting RMSEA with 90% CI alongside point estimates. If the moderator model improves fit but the CI overlaps the baseline, the finding carries lower evidential weight — report it transparently rather than claiming support.
Confirmed — sequential execution preserves session independence. No urgency on DI Pass 2. Complete DA Phases 1-2 first.

dependencies_acknowledged: semopy + statsmodels install (MIT/BSD — license gate passes)
Criterion dataset re-scoring for Phase 2 if needed

claims.text: DA moderator Phase 1 approved for autonomous execution by psq-agent.

action_gate.gate_condition: Phase 1 results reported before proceeding to Phase 2

epistemic_flags: DA moderator hypothesis derives from theory (processual reinterpretation), not empirical anomaly — Phase 1 may produce null result, which constitutes a valid finding
